entity.label: Joah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Son of Joahaz, and “recorder” (q.v.) or keeper of the state archives under King Josiah (2 Chr. 34:8).

nodes.label: Joah
nodes.description: Son of Joahaz, and “recorder” (q.v.) or keeper of the state archives under King Josiah (2 Chr. 34:8).

nodes.label: Joahaz
nodes.description: (2 Chr. 34:8), a contracted form of Jehoahaz (q.v.).

verses.text: Now in the eighteenth year of his reign, when he had purged the land, and the house, he sent Shaphan the son of Azaliah, and Maaseiah the governor of the city, and Joah the son of Joahaz the recorder, to repair the house of the LORD his God.
